name: Best jeanist - Tsunagu Hakamada
description: Fiber Master (ファイバーマスター, Faibā Masutā?) Allows the User to freely manipulate the threads in any nearby piece of fabric. This Quirk can manipulate all cloth, but works especially well with denim and is least effective on sweats. Alongside the fibers of fabric, carbon fibers are also able to be manipulated.
creator: Themaneater_628
